'''Aabatar''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who was once hired by another smuggler on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dac/Legends|Dac]] to work on his [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]]. Aabatar was paid two hundred [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] per day for his services.

{{Char-stub}}
